text: I talked with my friends today and felt some optimism.
My friends helped me and gave me support.
Work has been stressful and emotional recently.
I feel nervous because of work.
I had pain and sadness during the night.
The pain made me feel shame and nervousness.
I kept thinking about death and violence in my mind.
There was dispute and shame in the discussion.
I started healing and felt more optimism.
Love and friends helped me recover.
Work was heavy and I felt emotional.
Pain and shame made me nervous.
I had nervousness and dispute with others.
Friends gave me fun and optimism.
Healing and optimism made me feel better.
